title: 60cm Long Rectangular Plastic Trough Planter, Black | 18L Raised Trough/Windowsill Herb Planter | Weather-Resistant, Outdoor Balcony Flower Pot | Plant Pot for Garden
features: VERSATILE GROWING SPACE: This 60cm trough planter is suitable for cultivating flowers, herbs, and vegetables, making it a practical addition to any garden, balcony, or patio
WEATHER-RESISTANT & DURABLE: Made from sturdy, weather-resistant plastic, this trough planter is built for year-round outdoor use, ensuring longevity in all seasons.
LIGHTWEIGHT & EASY TO MOVE: Designed for convenience, the lightweight build allows for effortless repositioning so you can arrange your plants as needed.
STURDY DESIGN WITH RIPPLED WALLS: The rippled wall structure enhances strength and durability, offering extra stability for your plants.
CUSTOMISABLE DRAINAGE: Featuring a solid base, this trough planter allows you to drill drainage holes as needed, providing flexibility for different planting needs.
description: Cheerful Bargains 60cm Black Plastic Trough Planter This 60cm rectangular planter provides ample space for flowers, herbs, or vegetables. It is lightweight yet sturdy for easy repositioning and is suitable for gardens, balconies, and windowsills. This planter is a practical choice for any outdoor setting. Made from weather-resistant plastic, it withstands sun, rain, and frost without cracking or fading. The classic black colour complements any garden, while the rippled wall design enhances strength and durability. This trough-style planter offers a traditional aesthetic that blends seamlessly with various outdoor spaces, making it a versatile addition to your gardening essentials. The solid base allows for customisable drainage - drill holes if needed to prevent overwatering. Spacious enough for healthy root growth, it supports herbs, flowers, and vegetables. Whether placed along a fence, on a balcony ledge, or in a greenhouse, this planter provides a reliable solution for growing plants year-round. Key Features: 60cm trough planter for flowers, herbs, and vegetables Weather-resistant plastic for durability in all seasons Lightweight and easy to move Rippled walls enhance strength and resilience Customisable drainage; drill holes if needed The classic black colour complements any garden Suitable for patios, balconies, and windowsills Specifications: Material: Durable Plastic Colour: Black Dimensions: L: 60cm/23.62"; W: 19cm/7.48"; H: 16cm/6.30" Weight: 0.52kg Capacity: 18L Includes: 1x 60cm black trough planter
